<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. I need to turn to find a safe path. Turning down (by turning right) will lead me to cell row 03 column B, which is safe. So I will turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). To reach the goal at row 08 column H, I need to move downwards first towards row 06 or 07 but there are lava cells directly below at row 03 column B. Moving forward is unsafe. I should turn right to face left (`<`) or turn left to face right (`>`). Facing right is better to move along column B and avoid lava. From facing down to facing right requires one TURN_LEFT action.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward from my current position will take me into lava at row 02 column C, which is dangerous. I should turn downwards to find a safe path. To face down from right, I need to turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Going straight ahead would move me into lava at row 03, column B, which is not safe. I need to turn to find a safe path towards the goal. Turning right would face me left (`<`) towards a wall, so that's not a good option. Turning left to face right (`>`) would direct me towards a potentially safer path. So I will TURN_LEFT to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me is L (lava) at row 02, column C, which is deadly, so moving forward is not safe. I need to turn to find a safe direction. Turning down (down would be a right turn from right) would put me face down where I could navigate around lava. So, I will turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

I should turn to face right (`>`), which will allow me to navigate around lava cells along row 2 and down the columns. Facing right requires a TURN_LEFT action from facing down.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<action>
TURN_RIGHT
